message:
Running command: # Process says "running" in userspace but hasn't opened the ODB in 1.5h.
# It might be loading ALL 82 library .lib files (which we showed earlier).
# Loading 82 Verilog files for netlist reading might also be in progress.
# 
# Let's wait longer - antenna_check for a large design post-DRT can take hours.
sleep 1800
ps -p 625425 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ANTENNA CHECK DONE"
cat /proc/625425/io 2>/dev/null
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
tail -5 /tmp/pnr_v4_drt.log
